response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work, and their GIS work uses DLang and Node.js, not the required stack.
strengths: Strong geospatial project experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and build scalable systems
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated systems-level programming skills
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tiling pipelines
Primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — not aligned with required C++ focus
Lacks demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration
